item.title: Goals
item.description: Interests AI / ML Agriculture Drawing Go (board game) Hardware Hiking Language Learning Piano Reading Reverse Engineering Security Space Starcraft Tea Travel Action Items November 2019 finish Practical Malware Analysis - Michael Sikorski and Andrew Honig continue A Guide to Japanese Grammar - Tae Kim continue Remembering The Kanji 1 - James W. Heisig to reach 2000 kanji re-read Neuromancer - William Gibson 40x situps, pushups, squats per day hiking once per week starcraft 1hr after work per weekday build a personal website December 2019 finish Remembering The Kanji 1 - James W.

item.title: Books
item.description: Current/Upcoming Reads Practical Malware Analysis - Michael Sikorski and Andrew Honig A Guide to Japanese Grammar - Tae Kim Remembering The Kanji 1 - James W. Heisig Remembering The Kanji 3 - James W. Heisig Neuromancer - William Gibson Count Zero - William Gibson Mona Lisa Overdrive - William Gibson Malware Data Science - Joshua Saxe with Hillary Sanders Backlog Security The Hardware Hacker - Andrew “bunnie” Huang Rootkits and Bootkits - Alex Matrosov, Eugene Rodionov, and Sergey Bratus Practical Binary Analysis - Dennis Andriesse Real-World Bug Hunting - Peter Yaworski Black Hat Python - Justin Seitz Attacking Network Protocols - James Forshaw Serious Cryptography - Jean-Philippe Aumasson Game Hacking - Nick Cano PoC||GTFO - Manul Laphroaig Novels Snow Crash - Neal Stephenson Pattern Recognition - William Gibson Recommendations Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?

item.title: About
item.description: This Site Hello there! Welcome to my brain’s dumping ground. The inspiration to create a personal website came from reading through the monthly discussions on Hacker News about the advantages of doing so. Also, I like reading security blogs and would like to post my own research findings here while practicing my technical writing. That said, I want to use this site, not as a professional portfolio, but more as a means to organize and share my knowledge, ideas, thoughts, and resources.
